samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_pipe_4bit">
    <description>Implement a 4-bit unsigned number pipeline multiplier.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset.</input>
        <input id="mul_a" width_description="[3:0]">Multiplicand.</input>
        <input id="mul_b" width_description="[3:0]">Multiplier.</input>
        <output id="mul_out" width_description="[7:0]">Product.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="size">4</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
    <task>
        <description>Extend input signals.</description>
        <parameter_description>
            <parameter name="i">Loop index.</parameter>
        </parameter_description>
        <implementation>
            <assign name="extension_a">{{size{1'b0}}, mul_a};</assign>
            <assign name="extension_b">{{size{1'b0}}, mul_b};</assign>
        </implementation>
    </task>
    <task>
        <description>Calculate partial products.</description>
        <parameter_description>
            <parameter name="i">Loop index.</parameter>
        </parameter_description>
        <implementation>
            <assign name="partial_product[i]">extension_a & {32{extension_b[i]}};</assign>
        </implementation>
    </task>
    <task>
        <description>Calculate sum of partial products.</description>
        <parameter_description>
            <parameter name="i">Loop index.</parameter>
        </parameter_description>
        <implementation>
            <assign name="sum[i]">partial_product[0][i] + partial_product[1][i] + partial_product[2][i] + partial_product[3][i];</assign>
        </implementation>
    </task>
    <task>
        <description>Calculate the final product.</description>
        <parameter_description>
            <parameter name="i">Loop index.</parameter>
        </parameter_description>
        <implementation>
            <assign name="mul_out">sum[0] + (sum[1] << 1) + (sum[2] << 2) + (sum[3] << 3);</assign>
        </implementation>
    </task>
    </implementation>
    </module>
